systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Bundle that includes the codex provider package. This plan modifies the provider only.

systems.name: ChatGPT backend (codex)
systems.description: External system. Receives Responses-API HTTP/WS calls. Provider mirrors the public interface; we don't run the codex CLI itself.

containers.name: codex provider package (packages/opencode-codex-provider)
containers.description: All changes in this plan land here. Six files touched: headers.ts, provider.ts, transport-ws.ts, types.ts, empty-turn-classifier.ts plus their tests.

containers.name: opencode runtime (packages/opencode)
containers.description: Caller of the provider. Not modified by this plan; consumes the provider's existing public API which gains only one additive option (threadId).

containers.name: Responses API endpoints
containers.description: Public ChatGPT backend endpoints (HTTP /responses + WebSocket variant). Wire-format expectations updated per upstream codex commits in scope.

components.name: headers.ts buildHeaders + buildClientMetadata
components.description: A1: gains threadId option (defaults to sessionId); emits thread_id HTTP header alongside session_id; switches x-client-request-id source from conversationId to threadId. INV-1, INV-2 enforced here.

components.name: provider.ts request body builder
components.description: A2: prompt_cache_key sources from threadId (defaults to sessionId for unchanged single-thread behavior). Custom promptCacheKey override path preserved. INV-3 enforced here.

components.name: transport-ws.ts ws.send wrapper + WS observer state
components.description: A3: wraps ws.send(...) with promise + idle-timeout race using existing WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS. On stall, sets wsErrorReason='ws_send_timeout' and aborts. INV-4 enforced here.

components.name: empty-turn-classifier.ts
components.description: A4: extends transient-failure reason set to include ws_send_timeout with retry recovery. INV-5 enforced here.

components.name: types.ts request input shape
components.description: Adds threadId?: string to the relevant input type (single additive field).

relationships.label: calls provider with input including sessionId/threadId
emits HTTP headers (session_id + thread_id + x-client-request-id) on every request
sends ws.send() frames; bounded by WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
transmits wsErrorReason snapshot on stream end
